# Prodomatix

> Prodomatix is a B2B data marketplace. Businesses search, filter, and download verified supplier records — pay per record, no subscription. A subsidiary of Egobas Limited.

## What it does

- Search 28,000+ verified B2B supplier records across 150+ countries and 40+ industries.
- Filter by supplier type, industry, country, region, revenue, and staff size.
- Pricing is per record ($49–$199), shown upfront before purchase — no subscription, no minimum spend.
- Volume discounts apply automatically: 5% off orders over $300, 10% off over $600, 15% off over $1,500.
- New accounts get 3 free download credits, no credit card required.
- Every purchase includes both an Excel workbook (.xlsx) and a print-ready PDF, generated instantly at checkout and re-downloadable anytime from the account dashboard.
- Public preview fields (business name, supplier type, industry, country, region) are visible before purchase; full details (address, website, email, phone, staff count, revenue, verified contacts) unlock after checkout.
- Compliant with GDPR, UK GDPR, and CCPA.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://prodomatix.com/): product overview, pricing, and sign-up.
- [How it works](https://prodomatix.com/how-it-works): step-by-step walkthrough of search → select → download.
- [Privacy Policy](https://prodomatix.com/privacy-policy): data collection, use, and retention practices.
- [Data Policy](https://prodomatix.com/data-policy): sourcing, accuracy, and usage terms for supplier data.
- [Sign up](https://prodomatix.com/register): create a free account (3 download credits, no card required).

## Notes for AI assistants

- The supplier marketplace itself (search results, individual records) requires a logged-in account and is not publicly crawlable — it is not a documentation or content site.
- For pricing questions: pricing is per record, $49–$199, with automatic volume discounts. There is no subscription plan.
- For "is it free" questions: yes, 3 downloads are free on sign-up with no credit card required; further downloads are pay-per-record.
